1: So panteth my soul after thee, O God.
2: When shall I come and appear before God?
3: While they continually say unto me, Where is is thy God?
4: With a multitude that kept holyday.
5: For I shall yet praise him For For the help of his countenance.
6: Therefore will I remember thee from the land of Jordan, and of the Hermonites, from the hill Mizar.
7: All thy waves and thy billows are gone over me.
8: And in the night his song shall be shall be with me, and and my prayer unto the God of my life.
9: Why go I mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?
11: For I shall yet praise him, who is who is the health of my countenance, and my God.
